Off Calendar Jan-24-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-27-2016 Continued To Jan-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-29-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cynthia Lee for (petitioner) Harland Wong.

The Court asked if counsel had any additional argument. Ms. Lee stated that it was a 3 page will, that it is indicated that the witness realized that this was a last will and testament, that the witness was a relative, that they have confirmed he is deceased but found his son, Frank Wong, who could attest to his fathers signature, that it meets the requirement of the Probate Code, that they have submitted evidence of his I.D. which shows the same handwriting, that they cannot locate the third witness even after checking with the Wong Association in Chinatown. The Court took the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Boncato. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Continued To Jun-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
